/CAL APD MOTION TO TERMINATE MANDATORY SUPERVISION DUE TO DEATH OF DEFENDT/MO GRTD/DEFT DECEASED/NP/BWR 06-05-14/BWR1/X MANDATORY SUPERVISION ISTERMINATED,/

/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(B), A SPLIT SENTENCE/X:DEFENDANTIS SENTENCE ON CASE NUMBERS #13001841 AND #11030637 AND 	001579/AJW/DNACOMP/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 (CASE #13001841) TO 3 YEARS, UPPER TERM/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 (CASE #11030637) TO 8 MONTHS, ONE THIRD MID TERM, CONSECUTIVE/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 (CASE # 9001579) TO  4 MONTHS,ONE THIRD MID TERM, CONSECUTIVE/PGM10:SF STRONG/X:TRANSPORTATION ORDER, SIGNED AND FILED/STATES/DEF: SHALL ALSO SERVE THE FOLLOWING ENHANCEMENT TERMS:/X:COUNT 1 (CASE #13001841) ENHANCEMENT PER PC 667,5(B) 1  YEAR, CONSECUTIVE/X:TOTAL  5 YEARS/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(B), THE SENTENCE IS TOBE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/X:DEFENDANT WAIVED ALL PRIOR CREDITS UP TO 05-14-13ON CASE NUMBERS #13001841 AND #11030637 AND 	001579/X:AS TO COUNT 1 (CASE #11030637)   DEF SHALL SERVE A TERM IN COUNTY JAIL FOR 8 MONTHS WITH 16 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED/X:AS TO COUNT 1 (CASE # 9001579)   DEF SHALL SERVE A TERM IN COUNTY JAIL FOR 4 MONTHS WITH 16 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED//MANSUP:4 YEARS/MANSUP1/DEF:IS NOT TO POSSESS BURGLARY TOOLS/DEF:TO PAY RESTITUTION TO LEIF VIEMOEN/RESTV/SA2: 509 MINNA STREET/WS/COA:40/ICNA/VF4:280/COLLECT/4019HALF/

/CAL:PRELIM HRG/X:COMPLAINT AMENDED TO ADD STATE PRISON PRIOR PURSUANT TOPC 667,5(B)/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/DEF:ADMITS PRIOR ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO PC 667,5(B)/REMA/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:05-14-13/
